catalog_content:
Item Name: Terrasoul Superfoods Raw Unpasteurized Organic Almonds (Mylk Grade), 4 Pounds Bullet Point 1: Terrasoul Superfoods Raw Unpasteurized Organic Almonds (Mylk Grade), 4 Pounds Bullet Point 2: USDA Certified Organic, Earth Kosher, Non-GMO, Raw, Gluten-Free, Vegan Bullet Point 3: Our almonds are imported from Europe and aren't steam or chemically pasteurized as required for all U.S. grown and sold almonds, even those labeled as "Raw". Bullet Point 4: We lab test each batch for aflatoxins and pesticide residues. Bullet Point 5: 100% Money-Back Satisfaction Guarantee - We stand behind our products and offer a 30-day money back guarantee, backed by an outstanding customer service team. Product Description: About Terrasoul Superfoods Organic Mylk Grade Unpasteurized Almonds:
Our raw and unpasteurized almonds are perfect for making luxurious homemade almond milks.
Our Mylk grade almonds are a special almond specification we supply to national nut milk brands and the country’s best organic juice bars.
We import a unique almond variety not grown in the U.S. that contains a higher fat and oil content that makes a luxuriously smooth and rich tasting almond milk.
You can also dehydrate the remaining almond pulp to make nutrient-dense almond flour.

Potential Health Benefits of Unpasteurized Almonds:
~ Healthy fats, fiber, protein, magnesium and vitamin E
~ Our almonds contain NO propylene oxide gas residues, a known carcinogen
~ Lower blood sugar levels, reduced blood pressure and lower cholesterol levels
~ Reduce hunger and promote weight loss

Suggested Uses: Use to make delicious homemade almond milk and gluten-free almond meal/flour.

About Terrasoul Superfoods:
Our mission at Terrasoul Superfoods is to distribute the freshest, most nutrient-dense foods grown with integrity in healthy soils on sustainable, organic farms.
Working in close partnership with our suppliers enables us to offer the highest quality ingredients at a superior value.

Find us on Instagram and Facebook for tips on how to use our ingredients and superfood recipes. Value: 64.0 Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Organic, non-GMO, and gluten-free almonds positioned as a premium ingredient for homemade almond milk and almond flour. Imported from Europe with higher fat content for richer texture, targeting health-conscious consumers. Plastic pouch packaging with clear organic and quality certifications suggests mid-to-high pricing. No explicit premium branding or bundle deal indicated.
